notes: Solid Pong implementation with AI, 2-player mode, sound, trail effects, and score display, but the score increment bug (double-counting in resetAfterScore) and minor collision edge cases slightly hurt functionality and playability.
Great overall structure and authentic retro feel, but a math error in the collision response causes the ball to teleport behind the paddles and pass through them on every hit.
Looks like Pong and mostly runs, but scoring is clearly broken due to double-incrementing points and the title prompt does not match actual start behavior.
